name: telaflow
description: TelaFlow monorepo — Cloud, Player, shared contracts

scripts.test:cloud-api: npm run build:contracts && cd apps/cloud-api && python3 -m pip install -q -e ".[dev]" && python3 -m pytest tests/ -q
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @telaflow/shared-contracts && npm run typecheck -w cloud-web && npm run typecheck -w player
